name: io.github.ShieldZCash/mcp
description: Keyless, non-custodial crypto payments for AI agents. Create payment links and tip jars with only a destination wallet address, no account and no API key. OFAC-screened and rate-limited.

environmentVariables.name: SHIELDZ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set a sk_live_/sk_test_ key to additionally enable full invoice management tools. Omit for keyless mode.
